response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems experience, including microservices, event-driven architecture, and real-time systems, which aligns well with the fintech and agentic AI requirements. His contributions to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq and low-latency systems at Dunnhumby are relevant. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of scaling engineering organizations to 10+ people, deep fintech infrastructure experience, or direct experience with multi-agent AI systems in production. The recent career gap and limited evidence of leadership in high-stakes regulated environments further reduce confidence.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with event-driven and microservices architecture
Hands-on experience with real-time systems and low-latency applications (e.g., Dunnhumby)
Contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) at re:cinq
concerns: Limited evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ people or developing senior technical leadership
No explicit fintech infrastructure experience (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance)
No clear track record of operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments
